response.justification: The candidate is a poor fit for this role due to a complete mismatch on core requirements. Most importantly, he lacks the mandatory native-level Japanese language proficiency. Additionally, his extensive experience is in web and cloud technologies (TypeScript, Node.js, Dlang), not the required embedded C development for networking. His resume shows no experience with the specified networking (L2/L3, switches) or security (MACsec, 802.1X) technologies.
strengths: Extensive experience as a senior/staff software engineer at major tech companies.
Strong background in software craftsmanship, CI/CD, and building developer tools.
Broad experience with multiple programming languages, indicating adaptability.
concerns: Lacks the mandatory native-level Japanese language proficiency.
No demonstrated experience in the required networking (L2/L3, switches) or network security (MACsec, 802.1X) domains.
Relevant C/C++ and embedded systems experience is minimal and not recent (2014-2015).
